status: COMPLETE (first pass). Public source repos (aukora-kernel, aukora-fu) classified with rationale+confidence. aukora-symbiote is sanitized: number/state/url + capability_family + disposition only — NO titles/labels/bodies. Full titles/rationale live ONLY in the private SENSITIVE ledger in aukora-symbiote. Dispositions are a first pass pending owner ratification.
redaction_policy: aukora-symbiote is private. Only metadata + derived disposition are published. Titles, labels, bodies, and comments are withheld and never leave the private repo.

coverage_proof.note_no_family_dropped: 8/11 symbiote capability families are preserved (>=1 IMPLEMENTED/PORT/PRODUCT_STAYS/RESEARCH_ONLY). 3 families (convex, persistence, adapter-contract) are currently all-QUARANTINE and are FLAGGED for owner review so no capability family silently disappears.

kernel_13_17_reconciliation.note: The kernel #13–#17 'breakthrough carry-forward ledger' is reconciled here: each is given exactly one disposition consistent with this ledger; no breakthrough item is dropped silently.

entries.title: [TEST] Make regex complexity coverage non-vacuous
entries.rationale: Make regex complexity coverage non-vacuous — test-hardening for the council regex path implemented in @aukora/council.

entries.title: Future: sovereign local GLM-5.2 via Colibri — local council member, grammar-forced verdicts, receiptable output
entries.rationale: Future sovereign local GLM-5.2 via Colibri — a future/spike local council member; not slated for the core now.

entries.title: Public repository hygiene: license, claims, history, and newcomer boundary
entries.rationale: Public-repo hygiene (license, claims, history, newcomer boundary) — addressed by the Sam-1 release lane: LICENSE/NOTICE/CLAIMS/CONTRIBUTING/COMMERCIAL_LICENSE.

entries.title: Harden live Fu transport: shared spend, deadline, served identity, and evidence
entries.rationale: Harden live Fu transport (shared spend, deadline, served identity, evidence) — served-model verification + spend est. already IMPLEMENTED in @aukora/council; live transport is the adapter to port.

entries.title: [EPIC] Aukora Seed Lab v0 — governed restoration made visible
entries.rationale: EPIC Seed Lab v0 (governed restoration made visible) — partly IMPLEMENTED as apps/console; remainder to port.

entries.title: Local model spike: tiny router/chat engine with pinned optional download
entries.rationale: Local model spike: tiny router/chat engine with pinned optional download — spike/research.

entries.title: Seed Shell v0: Chat + KNVS + AUMLOK/AURA control surface
entries.rationale: Seed Shell v0 Chat + KNVS + control surface — chat/product UI surface; stays in the product/Fu app, not the core.

entries.title: Governed Forge: separate signed-state restoration from novel mutation
entries.rationale: Governed Forge: separate signed-state restoration from novel mutation — relates to apps/seed recursion; port when earned.

entries.title: EvidencePackV1: freeze one canonical contract and build the two-stage evidence path
entries.rationale: EvidencePackV1 canonical contract + two-stage evidence path — IMPLEMENTED in @aukora/evidence (validate/digest/canonical).

entries.title: [TRACK] Round 24 breakthrough carry-forward ledger
entries.rationale: Round-24 process/carry-forward tracker; superseded by later-round ledgers and this preservation ledger.

entries.title: [DESIGN] Resource Governor v0 from preserved metabolism research, with boring names and zero authority
entries.rationale: Resource Governor v0 design from preserved research, boring names / zero authority — a governor to build into the seed when earned.

entries.title: [QUARANTINE] Repair Nebius G1 blockers before any deploy, arm, or spend
entries.rationale: Explicitly labelled QUARANTINE: Nebius G1 deploy/arm/spend blockers; must stay parked until repaired.

entries.title: [BUILD] Harden the imported Symbiote release-export pipeline for public organism publication
entries.rationale: Harden Symbiote release-export pipeline for public organism publication — release-lane build target for aukora.

entries.title: [IMPORT] Canonicalize preserved Symbiote portable primitives already in the organism tree
entries.rationale: Canonicalize preserved Symbiote portable primitives; some already IMPLEMENTED as @aukora/* packages, remainder to port.

entries.title: [DOCS] Pin GHP Boundary Program as non-normative research provenance
entries.rationale: Pin GHP Boundary Program as NON-NORMATIVE research provenance — stays research/provenance docs.

entries.title: [DESIGN] OperationalConstraintV1 — monotonic deny-only adaptive constraints (post-v0.1)
entries.rationale: OperationalConstraintV1 monotonic deny-only constraints, explicitly post-v0.1 — future build target.

entries.title: [DEMO] Engineer shock test: one-command hostile replay + receipt explorer
entries.rationale: Hostile-replay shock test + receipt explorer demo — a demo/harness to build into the seed.

entries.title: [AUDIT] Verify third-party blind-spot hypotheses against exact Kernel bytes
entries.rationale: Audit of third-party blind-spot hypotheses against exact kernel bytes — verification/research.

entries.title: [DESIGN] Operator’s Code provenance + testable-law join
entries.rationale: Operator's Code provenance + testable-law join — design to build; not yet earned.

entries.title: [BUILD] Mandatory FuRoundArtifactV1 pre-synthesis gate + owner-armed 8+2 council
entries.rationale: Mandatory FuRoundArtifactV1 pre-synthesis gate + owner-armed 8+2 council — council/Fu build target.

entries.title: [DESIGN] OrganismRootV1 + pairwise AUMLOK/AURA lineage with drand witness
entries.rationale: OrganismRootV1 + pairwise AUMLOK/AURA lineage with drand witness — governance design to build.

entries.title: [EPIC] Aukora Global Workspace v0 — three rings, mandatory Fu, governed identity
entries.rationale: EPIC Global Workspace v0 (three rings, mandatory Fu, governed identity) — large epic; port/build incrementally.
